business_hours.timezone: infer from location — Canada, likely EST or PST, flag as unknown

emergency_definition: After-hours calls from G&M Pressure Washing (property manager)
Calls related to Chevron or Esso gas stations managed by G&M

emergency_routing_rules.who_to_call: Ben (owner) — transfer to his second number once available
emergency_routing_rules.trigger: Caller identifies as G&M Pressure Washing or mentions Shelly or a gas station emergency
emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Take name, number, address and assure callback

non_emergency_routing_rules.office_hours: Clara answers, collects name and number, provides pricing info if asked, schedules callback or appointment
non_emergency_routing_rules.after_hours: Clara answers, explains next business day callback, takes message

call_transfer_rules.transfer_number: Ben's second number — to be provided

pricing_info.mention_policy: Only mention pricing if caller asks — do not volunteer on every call

after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller. If G&M/emergency: collect details, transfer to Ben's second number. For all others: take message, confirm next business day callback.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller. Collect name and number. Answer basic service/pricing questions if asked. Route or take message for Ben.
questions_or_unknowns: Ben's second phone number (for call transfer) — pending
G&M Pressure Washing contact number/email not fully captured in transcript
notes: Ben uses Android. Call forwarding to Clara set up as 'forward if not answered or declined'. Clara should NOT answer if Ben picks up. Service area not specified but likely local city (Canada).
